description: The ScaleGroup component is used to make a touchable selection system that can be used to select items like the Steamtm store and big picture menus.

fields.SelectedElement: The currently selected element for this group.
fields.IdleScale: The scale of elements when they aren't selected.
fields.BackgroundScale: The scale of elements when they go into the background.
fields.SelectedScale: The scale of any element when it is selected.
fields.SmoothSpeed: The speed at which elements change scale when they change state.

usage: Used with a Scale Element list to make a list of selectable elements. Using ProtoFlux to get the slot of the ``SelectedElement`` can make this useful for a physical based selection system usable in both VR and Desktop.
